_comment: File is auto-generated, do not edit it manually.

zero.comment: Use to set a media query `min-width` below small.

sm.comment: The `min-width` for mobile devices, such as phones and tablets.

xl.comment: Used for extra large screens, such as wide monitors and TVs.

5.comment: Banners, Snackbars, Toast Messages, Non modal Dialogs, ; Side Panels (when opacity overlay behaviour is not applied)

6.comment: Modal Dialogs, Side Panels (when opacity overlay behaviour; is applied)

hover.comment: State layer applied to surface colors on hover

pressed.comment: State layer applied to surface colors while pressing

hover.comment: State layer applied to accent colors on hover

pressed.comment: State layer applied to accent colors while pressing

none.comment: Full-width and background containers. Fixed navigation containers such as headers, and side-panels.

xl.comment: Extra large rounding for prominent containers

xxl.comment: Extra extra large rounding for cards and items

xxxl.comment: Maximum rounding for modals and large containers

full.comment: Full rounding is reserved high-visibility components. This shape is intended to draw attention. Buttons, Badge, Status Indicator, Essential Inputs, Border Containers (Not Cards)

xxs.comment: Compact indicators. Used for status indicators and count badges.

xs.comment: Compact interactive elements. Used for small buttons, pills, checkboxes, and radio buttons.

sm.comment: Standard interactive components. Used for buttons, segmented controls, tooltips, and avatars.

md.comment: Default size for most components. Used for buttons, segmented controls, banners, input fields, and menu items.

lg.comment: Prominent components. Used for large buttons, segmented controls, expandable triggers, tabs, and avatars.

xl.comment: Content containers. Used for table cells and toasts.

xxl.comment: Expandable containers. Used for expandable containers in their collapsed state.

none.comment: Use when there should be no space between content and element's edges.

sm.comment: Compact padding, used in Rich Text Editor, or X-Small Buttons

md.comment: Default padding used for components used around Small Button content.

lg.comment: Large padding, used in Medium Buttons with Icons

xl.comment: Padding used around Card and Medium Button content

xxl.comment: Padding used around Modal and Large Button content

none.comment: Use when there is no space between elements

xs.comment: Compact spacing from icon to text, labels to inputs, between tab items.

sm.comment: Horizontal space between pills, tighter space between buttons, inline icon to text, segmented controls.

md.comment: Use the default inline spacing when other gap tokens may not fit.

lg.comment: Use this for tighter spacing between cards. Cards are self contained blocks of content.

xl.comment: Use this for the default spacing between cards, as well as the gutter width used in the large 12-column grid.

xxl.comment: Use this for the space between content sections

default.comment: Default background for containers on top of the page

navigation.comment: Background for navigation containers like sidebars and top bars

popover.comment: Background for floating containers like dropdowns and tooltips

raised.comment: Separates a layer from the surface, e.g. table headers or sticky elements

default.comment: De-emphasized container background for secondary information

strong.comment: Stronger de-emphasized container background

loading.comment: Background for skeleton loaders and loading states
